raw.message: 🐰 Fair! Free! Fun! 🥚 No purchase needed! No rigged games! Grab your Easter luck for FREE! 🚢🍀

hook.summary: Rapid-fire bingo wins with festive Santa overlays and high-energy calling.
hook.visual_action: A hand taps bingo cards as multiple 'Triple' and 'Quadra' bingo pop-ups appear over a 6-card layout.

scene_flow: Fast-paced gameplay showing multiple bingo cards being filled simultaneously with celebratory pop-ups.
Santa Claus 'Jackpot Bingo' overlays cover all active cards in quick succession as numbers are called.
Transition to a festive winter landscape featuring Santa, Mrs. Claus, and a snowman.
Final end card with game logo, search bar, and 'Play Now' call to action.
audience_proxy: Casual players, particularly seniors and bingo enthusiasts, who enjoy festive themes and high-frequency winning mechanics.
